goal: Provide a structured growth queue from the 24-game seed catalog toward a 150-game private-demo catalog without requiring full price or cover ingestion for every title.
promotionChecklist: canonical title and likely platform scope
cover snapshot or explicit fallback poster
source confidence and manual review state
price need classified as none, watch_only, warm, or hot

lanes.label: Cinematic story
lanes.purpose: Narrative and prestige games that validate PlaySputnik as a companion for story-first adults.

lanes.label: Open-world / RPG
lanes.purpose: Longer commitment games where taste, time, and purchase timing matter.

lanes.label: Systems RPG
lanes.purpose: Choice, builds, tactics, and complex RPG fit/risk signals.

lanes.label: Action challenge
lanes.purpose: Action, difficulty, short-run, and mastery preferences.

lanes.label: Cozy / short
lanes.purpose: Low-friction weeknight games and short emotional experiences.

lanes.label: Co-op / multiplayer
lanes.purpose: Social, service, and repeatable multiplayer formats.

lanes.label: Strategy / management
lanes.purpose: Long-system games, management loops, and tactical preferences.

lanes.label: Sports / service
lanes.purpose: Annual sports, racing, competitive loops, and service-game caution.

lanes.label: Upcoming watch
lanes.purpose: Wishlist and unreleased games that should drive radar, not fake price certainty.
